voters.comment: = S²r²hti / LngJace

voters.comment: Me listening to this on the way to a wedding and realizing I forgot to paint my fingernails: "Dang, my fingernails do NOT shine like justice"

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: If I had a spare doot to give, I'd give it to the OC (the original cake, hello comfort eagle my old friend)

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: I haven't thought about this song in years! I remember I had a high school theology teacher who used to play it in his class all the time

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: 1 point from the toddler

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: If I had one more point to give, it would be to this, a classic booty shaker song.

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Top-tier Cake choice. 🤝

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Dang I had totally forgotten about this band. Immediately went and listened to "Love You Madly" after this

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: That's definitely Cake!

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: This is a very fine song. I like other CAKE songs better but this one is fine.

voters.name: Rose
voters.comment: I reallllly wanted to love this song. I feel like it grows on me each time I listen to it and eventually I'm going to be in love with it.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I quite like the very beginning of this one but find myself wishing the vocalist was a little more melodic. The synth in it is a really good vibe though.

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: Love Daði

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: This was so cute and fun!

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: I like your weird guy.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I wasn't sure about this one at first but +1 for having me dancing at the kitchen while making dinner

voters.name: Dorothy
voters.comment: I do like how playful this song was

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I really dig this guy's vibe. It also sounds like he's constantly on the verge of a sneeze for the first part of the song.

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: Pour one out for the unofficial winner of eurovision 2020.

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: The fact that this is literally about a baby makes it so much better.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: This is so so good

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Definite earworm. I like your funky man and would give this more points if I had them!

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: The unofficial winners of Eurovision 2020, love some funky Daði.

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Mike: "Oh this must be the made up language song."Me: "No dude, this is Icelandic"I can't believe I didn't think about Sticks and Stones by Jónsi for this one, now that I think about it! But tbf a lot of that was in English. Still, loved how funky this was.
